sentence: 孩子对这个新奇的玩具爱不释手。
pinyin: Háizi duì zhège xīnqí de wánjù ài bù shì shǒu.
english: The child can't put down this novel toy.

sentence: 她从小就梦想成为一名模特儿。
pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo jiù mèng xiǎng chéng wéi yī míng mó tè ér.
english: She has dreamed of becoming a fashion model since she was little.

meaning: 1. to link up; 2. to thread together
sentence: 这条隧道贯通了南北两个城区。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo suìdào guàntōng le nán-běi liǎng gè chéngqū.
english: This tunnel links the northern and southern districts of the city.

meaning: 1. to travel around; 2. to roam; 3. (mobile telephony) roaming
sentence: 出国记得开通国际漫游服务。
pinyin: Chūguó jìde kāitōng guójì mànyóu fúwù.
english: Remember to activate international roaming when you go abroad.

meaning: 1. to lead troups; 2. (fig.) to lead; 3. leading
sentence: 她是这个行业的领军人物。
pinyin: Tā shì zhège hángyè de lǐngjūn rénwù.
english: She is a leading figure in this industry.
